title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.7 - Renamed cards for clarity: Warm Up -> Practice, Practice Strike -> Run Through, Medley -> Remix, Move On -> Roll With It, Take Two -> Unwind. Rebalanced Planned so it no longer snowballs: Magnum Opus now applies 2 (3 upgraded), Melody now 1 (2 upgraded), and every card that applies Planned starts at 1. Note: renamed cards won't carry into in-progress runs. Requires BaseLib.
